description: Curated query set for tool-routing accuracy benchmark (issue #30). Covers docs, LSP, and editor tools. Each query maps to an expected godot_* tool.

queries.query: What methods does the Node class have?
queries.notes: Asking to explore an entire class → get_class, not find_member

queries.query: Search for Godot classes related to physics bodies
queries.notes: Find by query → search_api; not looking up a specific class by name

queries.query: What is the signature of the move_and_slide method on CharacterBody2D?
queries.notes: Asking for exact details on one member → find_member

queries.query: How do I implement a state machine in Godot?
queries.notes: How-to question / guide → search_tutorials, not search_api

queries.query: Fetch the tutorial at /tutorials/scripting/gdscript/gdscript_basics
queries.notes: Fetch a known path → get_tutorial; discovery was already done

queries.query: What version of the Godot docs is currently loaded?
queries.notes: Report loaded docs version/coverage → docs_info, not get_class

queries.query: Find where the variable 'player_speed' is defined in my GDScript file
queries.notes: User GDScript symbol lookup → find_definition; NOT engine API lookup

queries.query: Find all usages of the function 'take_damage' in my project
queries.notes: Find references to a user-defined symbol → find_references

queries.query: Get hover documentation for the symbol at line 42, column 15 in player.gd
List all functions and variables defined in enemy.gd
queries.notes: List symbols in a specific file → document_symbols

queries.query: Search for all classes named 'Inventory' across my whole project
Are there any GDScript errors in my player.gd file?
queries.notes: Get diagnostics for a file → get_diagnostics

queries.query: What parameters does this function call take at line 23 in my script?
queries.notes: Signature help at a position → signature_help

queries.query: Rename the variable 'hp' to 'health' across my whole project
Open the Godot editor for my project at /home/user/game
Run the game project so I can test it
Stop the currently running Godot game
Show me the debug output and print statements from my running game
What version of Godot is installed on this machine?
Find all Godot projects in my /home/user/projects directory
What is the project name and Godot version for my game at /home/user/game?
Create a new scene file with a Node2D root node
Add a CollisionShape2D node to my player scene
Set the texture of the Sprite2D node to player.png
Export the props scene as a MeshLibrary resource
Save my current scene to disk
Get the UID for the player.gd resource file
Update all UID references in my Godot 4.4 project
What properties does the RigidBody3D class expose?
Look up the 'connect' method on the Signal type in the Godot API
queries.notes: Exact details on one member → find_member

queries.query: Search the Godot API for anything related to navigation agents
queries.notes: Find by query → search_api; not a specific class name

queries.query: Show me tutorials about multiplayer networking in Godot
Retrieve the tutorial page /tutorials/networking/high_level_multiplayer
How many classes are in the docs database and when was it last indexed?
queries.notes: Coverage/metadata → docs_info; not searching the API

queries.query: Where is my custom function 'spawn_enemy' defined in the project?
queries.notes: User-written symbol → find_definition, not engine API lookup

queries.query: Show me the type information for the variable at column 8, line 15 of game.gd
Check player.gd for any type errors or warnings
List all exported variables and signals in player.gd
queries.notes: Symbols in a specific file → document_symbols

queries.query: Find all places in the project that use a class called 'GameManager'
What arguments does the emit_signal call expect at line 55?
Preview what would change if I rename my class 'Enemy' to 'BaseEnemy'
Find all references to the 'health_changed' signal in my project
What signals does the Area2D class emit according to the Godot docs?
What is the 'body_entered' signal's description on Area2D?
queries.notes: Exact details on one signal → find_member

queries.query: Search the Godot docs for classes that handle 2D collision
I need a tutorial on how to use Godot's animation system
Get the tutorial page for /tutorials/animation/animation_tree
What Godot version's docs am I querying right now?
queries.notes: Version metadata → docs_info, not a class lookup

queries.query: Go to the definition of the 'shoot' function I wrote in weapon.gd
queries.notes: User-defined symbol → find_definition, not engine docs

queries.query: Does the AnimationPlayer class have an 'is_playing' property?
What does AnimationPlayer look like as a whole — all its methods and properties?
Find Godot API classes that inherit from Resource
How do I create custom resources in Godot?
What's in the tutorial at /tutorials/scripting/resources
Are there any linting issues in my enemy_ai.gd script?
Show an outline of all symbols in main.gd
Find the definition of 'PlayerState' in my codebase
queries.notes: User-defined type → find_definition, not Godot built-in

queries.query: Show me what all files reference the 'on_player_died' function
Get documentation hover for 'move_toward' at position 10:8 in movement.gd
Run the game's main scene for playtest
